# @wendermedia/astro-components

> Complete Astro development resource — production-ready, accessible, GDPR-compliant components for modern web development. 158 components across 17 categories.

## Tech Stack

- Astro 4.x / 5.x
- TypeScript 5.x
- Vitest (Unit + A11y testing)
- Storybook 8.x (Component docs)
- Style Dictionary (Design tokens)
- Changesets (Versioning)

## Component Categories

- `src/layout/` — Header, Footer, Container, Grid, Section
- `src/seo/` — SEOHead, SchemaOrg, Canonical, RichSnippets, Sitemap
- `src/accessibility/` — CookieConsent, SkipToContent, FontResizer, ThemeToggle, BackToTop
- `src/navigation/` — Breadcrumbs, Pagination, TableOfContents, ScrollToTop
- `src/sections/` — Hero and other section components (68 components)
- `src/content/` — Accordion, Tabs, Modal
- `src/ecommerce/` — Cart, Wishlist, ProductCard, ProductQuickView, AddToCartButton
- `src/media/` — VideoPlayer, AudioPlayer, ImageGallery
- `src/forms/` — ContactForm
- `src/gallery/` — BeforeAfter slider
- `src/ui/` — UI primitives (19 components)
- `src/images/` — OptimizedImage
- `src/products/` — Product cards
- `src/maps/` — Map components
- `src/social/` — Social sharing
- `src/design-system/` — Base styles, tokens, utilities

## Additional Features

- `integrations/` — WordPress headless CMS, React, Vue, Svelte, Solid
- `tokens/` — Design tokens via Style Dictionary
- `cli/` — Project scaffolding tool (`create-wm-component`)
- `bundles/` — Pre-configured component bundles
- `templates/` — Project templates (default, minimal, ecommerce, blog, landing)
- `testing/` — A11y test utilities

## Commands

- `npm run test` — Unit tests
- `npm run test:a11y` — Accessibility tests
- `npm run test:coverage` — Coverage report
- `npm run storybook` — Start Storybook (port 6006)
- `npm run tokens:build` — Build design tokens
- `npm run changeset` — Add a changeset

## Key Principles

- WCAG 2.1 AA / BFSG compliant
- GDPR/DSGVO ready (privacy-first, no third-party tracking)
- TypeScript-first with complete type definitions
- Dark mode support via CSS custom properties

## Storybook

Browse all 158 components interactively: https://wm-astro-components.netlify.app
